query:
SELECT id, project_name, university, major, createdAt 
FROM project_matches 
WHERE (university LIKE '%Washington%' OR university LIKE '%华盛顿%')
  AND (major LIKE '%Physics%' OR major LIKE '%物理%')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT id, project_name, university, major, createdAt 
FROM project_matches 
WHERE (university LIKE '%Washington%' OR university LIKE '%华盛顿%')
  AND (major LIKE '%Physics%' OR major LIKE '%物理%')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 15;
